contents:
[package]
name = "ironwood"
version = "0.2.0"
edition = "2024"
description = "Routing library: ed25519-addressed PacketConn over spanning tree"
license = "MPL-2.0"

[dependencies]
curve25519-dalek = "4"
crypto_box = "0.9"
murmur3 = "0.5"
rand = "0.8"
bytes = "1"
thiserror = "2"
tracing = "0.1"
async-trait = "0.1"
sha2 = "0.11.0"
hex = "0.4.3"
rustc-hash = "2.1.2"

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["full"]

[dependencies.ed25519-dalek]
version = "2"
features = ["rand_core"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
version = "0.7"
features = ["rt"]

[package]
name = "yggdrasil"
version = "0.3.0"
edition = "2024"
description = "Yggdrasil mesh networking service"
license = "MPL-2.0"

[package.metadata.deb]
name = "yggdrasil-ng"
maintainer = "Revertron"
section = "net"
priority = "optional"
depends = "$auto, systemd"
conflicts = "yggdrasil"
conf-files = ["/etc/yggdrasil/yggdrasil.toml"]
maintainer-scripts = "../../contrib/deb"
assets = [["target/release/yggdrasil", "usr/bin/yggdrasil", "755"], ["../../contrib/systemd/yggdrasil.service", "lib/systemd/system/yggdrasil.service", "644"], ["../../contrib/systemd/yggdrasil.sysusers", "usr/lib/sysusers.d/yggdrasil.conf", "644"]]

[[bin]]
name = "yggdrasil"
path = "src/main.rs"

[lib]
name = "yggdrasil"
path = "src/lib.rs"

[dependencies]
salsa20 = "0.10"
rand = "0.8"
thiserror = "2"
serde_json = "1"
blake2 = "0.10"
tracing = "0.1"
getopts = "0.2"
toml = "1"
toml_edit = "0.25"
hex = "0.4"
url = "2"
rcgen = "0.14.7"
glob-match = "0.2"
x509-parser = "0.18"
socket2 = "0.6.5"
getifaddrs = "0.6"
rustc-hash = "2.1.3"
arc-swap = "1.9"

[dependencies.ironwood]
path = "../ironwood"

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["full"]

[dependencies.ed25519-dalek]
version = "2"
features = ["rand_core", "pkcs8"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3"
features = ["env-filter", "local-time"]

[dependencies.time]
version = "0.3.53"
features = ["macros", "local-offset"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
version = "0.7"
features = ["rt"]

[dependencies.tokio-rustls]
version = "0.26"
default-features = false
features = ["ring"]

[dependencies.rustls]
version = "0.23"
default-features = false
features = ["ring", "tls12"]

[dependencies.tokio-tungstenite]
version = "0.26"
optional = true

[dependencies.futures-util]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.quinn]
version = "0.11"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["runtime-tokio", "rustls-ring", "log"]

[dependencies.ipnet]
version = "2"

[dependencies.tun-rs]
version = "2.8.7"
features = ["async_tokio"]
optional = true

[features]
default = ["ctl", "tun", "systemd", "ckr", "ws", "quic"]
ctl = []
tun = ["dep:tun-rs"]
ckr = ["dep:route_manager"]
systemd = ["dep:sd-notify"]
ws = ["dep:tokio-tungstenite", "dep:futures-util"]
quic = ["dep:quinn"]

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"android\"))".dependencies.route_manager]
version = "0.2"
optional = true

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies]
windows-service = "0.8.0"

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies.windows]
version = "0.62.2"
features = ["Win32_NetworkManagement_IpHelper", "Win32_System_LibraryLoader", "Win32_Foundation"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.sd-notify]
version = "0.5.0"
optional = true
